channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [updated] SpeedShotX-SAAS (fiducia-ai-inc-speedshotx-saas) has a new plan named speedshotx-core-plan
item.description:
The SpeedShotX Core Plan offers a simple and reliable way to deliver always-on customer and fan engagement. Designed for brands, teams, agencies, venues, and creators, it enables interactive try-on experiences and helps you start engaging audiences in the new engagement economy — all through a straightforward monthly subscription.
Note All creative assets — including images and merchandise content — are provided by the customer. SpeedShotX handles integration, activation, and analytics, but does not include content or data creation services.

item.title: [updated] SpeedShotX-SAAS (fiducia-ai-inc-speedshotx-saas) has a new plan named speedshotx-saas-30-day-trial-plan
item.description:
The SpeedShotX 30-Day Trial Plan gives you everything — full production platform access and features in one simple subscription — plus the ability to build up to 5 activations to test during this period. Designed for brands, teams, agencies, venues, and creators redefining how fans connect in the new engagement economy.
Note: The 30-Day Trial Plan includes full access to the SpeedShotX production platform and its feature set. All creative assets — including 3D models, videos, images, and collaboration content — are provided by the customer. SpeedShotX enables seamless integration, activation, and analytics, but does not include content or data creation services.
Join the Engagement Economy The SpeedShotX 30-Day Trial Plan delivers everything you need to power next-generation fan experiences — steady, smart, and built for what’s next.

item.title: [updated] SpeedShotX-SAAS (fiducia-ai-inc-speedshotx-saas) has a new plan named speedshotx-saas-pro-plan
item.description:
The *SpeedShotX Pro* Plan unlocks advanced capabilities to help you optimize campaigns and deepen customer and fan engagement. Designed for brands, teams, agencies, venues, and creators, it enables richer experiences through AI-driven interactions and multi-format media — all within a powerful monthly subscription built for growth.
Not Included:
Video indexing Object detection Live Data Overlays Popup interactive templates for coupons and other interactions Note All creative assets — including 3D models, videos, images, and collaboration content — are provided by the customer. SpeedShotX handles integration, activation, and analytics, but does not include content or data creation services.
